title: Real Pigs
description: Improving Pigs model making them more realistic
body:
«Real Pigs» Improves pigs models.
![Pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b0309c529684963bcb76a74a441b4b287952654.png)
This pack improves the appearance of pigs, making them more realistic and detailed, while still maintaining the vanilla style of Minecraft and new pigs don't stand out much from the other mobs.

_Optifine or EMF required_
